scenes.scene_heading: INT. MODERNIST MANSION - STAIRCASE LANDING - CONTINUOUS
scenes.narrative_action: Valerie violently yanks Toby back from the glowing acid pit, screaming her absolute rejection of the house's terms into the cavernous maw. The house shrieks in response, a deafening wail of tearing drywall. The grand staircase violently collapses. Valerie grabs Toby's belt and they surf a wave of splintering mahogany and shattered glass down into the lower foyer, desperately dodging snapping floorboards that try to bite their ankles.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: The Break into Three; Valerie makes her definitive moral choice, transitioning from passive survivor to active combatant against the entity.

scenes.scene_heading: INT. MODERNIST MANSION - SERVANT'S CORRIDORS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.narrative_action: Valerie drags Toby through the shifting, groaning architecture. She visualizes the original blueprints, physically shoving Toby into a narrow, unglamorous servant's corridor just as a massive crystal chandelier crashes exactly where they stood. She navigates the labyrinth, ripping open a concealed maintenance hatch to bypass a dead-end wall that has mutated into pulsating flesh.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: Demonstrates Valerie weaponizing her previously corrupt real estate knowledge (the blueprints) to save a life rather than exploit it.

scenes.narrative_action: Valerie and Toby drop into the kitchen. The room is a bio-hazard; the walls secrete corrosive acid, actively melting the stainless steel refrigerators. Valerie spots the surviving catering staff cowering behind the marble island. She physically hauls a paralyzed waiter to his feet, barking authoritative orders and herding the terrified group toward the pantry as the floor beneath them turns to acidic mush.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: Expands Valerie's redemption arc; she actively takes on the role of protector for the innocent, lower-class workers she previously ignored.

scenes.narrative_action: The group sprints through the melting pantry. Fleshy, muscular tendrils whip down from the ceiling vents, snapping at their heels. Valerie kicks down the heavy, reinforced steel door leading to the basement. She shoves Toby and the staff through the frame, then violently slams the steel door shut, severing a pursuing tendril in the jamb and throwing the heavy deadbolt.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: Escalates the physical threat of the house while securing a temporary, claustrophobic sanctuary for the final confrontation.

scenes.scene_heading: INT. MODERNIST MANSION - MECHANICAL ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.narrative_action: In the dim, vibrating mechanical room, Valerie hoists the weeping staff and Toby up into a rusted ventilation shaft leading to the exterior hillside. Toby reaches back to pull her up. Before Valerie can grab his hand, a heavy iron pipe swings out of the shadows, brutally smashing into her ribs. She collapses to the concrete as a blood-soaked, manic Richard Sterling steps into the flickering light.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: Reintroduces the human antagonist at the worst possible moment, forcing Valerie to confront the physical embodiment of her own corporate greed.

scenes.scene_heading: INT. MODERNIST MANSION - MECHANICAL ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.narrative_action: Richard grabs Valerie by her torn gown, dragging her across the concrete toward the steel door, gleefully declaring he will feed her to the house to keep his diamond mine alive. Valerie kicks his knee, breaking his grip. Sensing the conflict, the concrete walls of the mechanical room begin to physically groan and slide inward, threatening to crush them both into paste.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: Merges the human and supernatural threats; the house uses their conflict to trap them both in a literal shrinking room.

scenes.scene_heading: INT. MODERNIST MANSION - MECHANICAL ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.narrative_action: A claustrophobic, brutal brawl erupts in the shrinking room. Richard tackles Valerie against a vibrating water heater, his hands wrapping around her throat, crushing her windpipe. Valerie flails wildly, her fingers grazing a heavy cast-iron wrench abandoned on the floor. She grips the steel handle and brings it crashing down onto Richard's temple, shattering his grip.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: The physical climax of Valerie's character arc; she violently overpowers her abuser and the toxic corporate hierarchy he represents.

scenes.scene_heading: INT. MODERNIST MANSION - MECHANICAL ROOM - CONTINUOUS
scenes.narrative_action: Valerie scrambles away from a dazed Richard. She swings the bloody wrench with all her might, obliterating the main gas line valve. Thick, volatile fumes blast into the shrinking room. Fleshy, tooth-lined walls burst through the concrete, lunging for them. Valerie pulls her silver lighter, sparks the flint, tosses it into the gas geyser, and dives headfirst into the titanium panic room.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: The ultimate sacrifice play; Valerie destroys the source of her wealth and power to end the cycle of consumption.

scenes.scene_heading: INT. PANIC ROOM / EXT. HOLLYWOOD HILLS - CONTINUOUS
scenes.narrative_action: Valerie slams the heavy vault door shut just as the gas ignites. A catastrophic, earth-shattering explosion rips through the subterranean levels. The blast wave incinerates Richard and the fleshy labyrinth, blowing the roof clean off the foundation in a spectacular firestorm. Inside the panic room, Valerie is violently hurled against the titanium walls, gasping in the pitch black.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: Delivers the explosive, cathartic spectacle of the monster's destruction, cleansing the corruption with fire.

scenes.narrative_action: Hours later. The heavy vault door groans open. Valerie climbs out of the smoldering, blackened crater into the dawn light, battered but alive. She spots a massive, pristine diamond resting in the ash. She picks it up, feels its heavy promise, then intentionally hurls it back into the ruins. She turns her back on the fortune, walking away to join Toby on the distant hillside.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: The Denouement; proves Valerie's internal change is permanent by having her actively reject the ultimate physical temptation.

scenes.scene_heading: INT. MODERNIST MANSION - STAIRCASE LANDING - NIGHT
scenes.narrative_action: Valerie violently yanks Toby by his cheap suit lapels, pulling him back from the glowing, tooth-lined chasm. The house shrieks, a deafening wail of tearing drywall. The grand mahogany staircase physically collapses beneath them. Valerie grabs Toby's belt and they surf a wave of splintering wood and shattered glass down into the lower foyer, desperately dodging snapping, animated floorboards that try to bite their ankles.
scenes.dramaturgical_function: The Break into Three; Valerie makes her definitive moral choice, transitioning from passive survivor to active combatant against the entity.
